name: Triple Cheese Pizza
recipeIngredient: 5 plum tomatoes, seeded and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 500°F.
Place pizza crust on a large baking sheet. Spread pesto over the crust. Sprinkle Fontina evenly over the surface. Arrange tomato slices over the top. Season with pepper. Sprinkle oregano over, then add mozzarella and Parmesan cheese. Bake until the crust is golden brown and toppings are bubbly, about 10 minutes. Garnish with fresh basil leaves.
